name: HM MOVE
title: Diagnostics & Preventive Testing
description: The primary entry service for comprehensive diagnostic testing and preventive healthcare. Book tests for yourself, family members, or parents (NRI case).
features: Browse comprehensive diagnostic categories
Book tests for yourself, family members, or parents
Choose between Home Collection or Lab Visit
Seamless integration with Digital Health Records
flow: Select Collection Type (Home Collection / Lab Visit)

name: HM EASY
title: Home Sample Collection
description: Get your medical samples collected from the comfort of your home by certified professionals.
features: Schedule convenient home collection slots
Certified and trained technicians assigned automatically
Strict hygiene and safety protocols
Direct integration with top diagnostic labs for processing

name: HM TRUST
title: Doctor Consultation
description: Consult with top doctors and specialists globally. Support for both online consultations and Doctor-at-Home visits.
features: Browse verified doctors by specialty
Book online consultations or request Doctor-at-Home visits
Receive digital prescriptions and test recommendations
Direct follow-up on diagnostic reports
flow: Enter Address (If Home Visit) or Choose Consultation Slot

name: HM RELY
title: NRI Parent Care
description: Dedicated healthcare management for NRIs managing healthcare for parents living in India.
features: Create and manage Parent Profiles from abroad
Book diagnostics, home care, and doctor visits for parents in India
Receive real-time notifications on parent's health updates
Access and share parent's digital health records instantly
flow: Add Parent Profile & Enter Address in India
Choose Service (Diagnostics / Home Collection / Doctor / Consultation)

name: HM OHR
title: Digital Health Records
description: Secure, centralized digital storage for all your family's medical reports and health history.
features: Automatic upload of HealthMetro diagnostic reports
Securely View, Download, or Share records
Manage records for yourself, family, and parents in one place
Maintains a complete digital health history

name: HM CLIN
title: Clinical Research Support
description: Explore and participate in global clinical studies to contribute to medical advancements.
features: Discover available clinical research studies
Read detailed study requirements, objectives, and benefits
Secure and straightforward application process
Contribute to global healthcare research safely
